title: LYMIN Squeaky Plush Dog Toy with Crinkle Paper - Indestructible Interactive Teething Toys for Small & Medium Breed Dogs - Gift for Christmas Birthday
features: Squeaky Dog Toy: This squeaky dog ​​toy features a built-in upgraded cylindrical sounder with an irresistible rustling paper sound. It squeaks when pressed or chewed, fully engaging your dog and keeping them entertained while preventing destructive chewing and barking.

Bubble Plush Dog Toy: Made with soft bubble-textured plush fabric and thickened mesh, this dog toy is comfortable to the touch and a great chew toy that also aids in oral hygiene. The double-layered mesh lining makes it more durable and tear-resistant.

Dog Chewing Toy: This plush dog toy features a realistic cartoon design that attracts your dog's attention and satisfies their natural chewing instincts. The animal shape satisfies their hunting and chewing instincts, keeping them focused and entertained during play.
Cleaning Teeth, Maintaining Health: The soft material helps clean your dog's teeth, reduces plaque, and massages gums without harming them.

Interactive Dog Toy: You can play interactive games with your dog such as tug-of-war, pulling, swinging, throwing, and dragging, keeping your dog entertained, relieving anxiety, and strengthening the bond between you and your dog.
